SQLLite.SQL: SELECT DECODE(COUNT(*),0,'false','true') AS "PaymentsExist" FROM PAYMENTS PY , WARRANTS W WHERE W.WARRANT_ID = ${param.warrantID} AND W.LOCAL_WARRANT_NUMBER IS NOT NULL AND PY.SUBJECT_NO = W.LOCAL_WARRANT_NUMBER AND PY.PAYMENT_FOR = 'FOREIGN WARRANT' AND PY.ENFORCEMENT_COURT_CODE = W.CURRENTLY_OWNED_BY

Security.roles: viewOnly medium high wcSuper scSuper bmsSuper aeSuper dmSuper cpSuper ccbcMan ccbcUser ccbcSGB2
